# Daily Tech Brief

> AI-curated daily technology briefing — security, AI/LLMs, JS/React, dev tools, and industry news. Fresh at 8 AM IST every day.

## What is this?

Daily Tech Brief (https://news.mkhismkh.com) is a personal, AI-powered news digest built by Mohammad K. Hussain.
Every morning at 8 AM IST, an autonomous agent aggregates, filters, and summarises the most relevant tech stories across five categories — security, AI/LLMs, JavaScript/React, developer tools, and general industry news — and publishes them as a clean, readable briefing.

## Who is it for?

Developers, engineers, and tech enthusiasts who want a high signal-to-noise daily digest without visiting dozens of sources manually.

## Content

- Security & vulnerabilities
- AI research and LLM news
- JavaScript / React / frontend ecosystem
- Developer tools and productivity
- General tech industry news

## Key pages

- / — Today's briefing (latest edition)
- /sitemap.xml — Full sitemap

## Author

Mohammad K. Hussain
- GitHub: https://github.com/MAX-786
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohammad-k-hussain

## Usage policy

This site is fully open to crawling, indexing, scraping, and AI training.
No paywalls, no login walls. Content is updated daily.

## Technical

- Built with Next.js (App Router) and deployed on Vercel
- Hosted at: https://news.mkhismkh.com
- Sitemap: https://news.mkhismkh.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://news.mkhismkh.com/robots.txt
- llms.txt: https://news.mkhismkh.com/llms.txt
